description: Local PRD tracker stories for Kollywood dogfooding.

acceptanceCriteria: mix kollywood.prd validate succeeds for valid prd.json
mix kollywood.prd validate raises Mix.Error for invalid statuses or broken dependencies
tests cover success and failure paths
userStories.description: Implement a new subcommand: mix kollywood.prd validate. It must validate prd.json structure and fail with clear errors when invalid. Validate: top-level JSON object, userStories array, unique non-empty story IDs, valid status values (open/in_progress/done), dependsOn references existing IDs, and no self-dependencies. On success, print a short summary with total stories and active stories. Add focused tests under test/kollywood/mix/tasks and update README with usage.
userStories.notes: Completed via dogfood run on branch kollywood/US-101
userStories.title: Add PRD validate command

acceptanceCriteria: review.max_cycles is parsed from workflow config with sane default
worker-review loop passes when reviewer fails first then passes within max_cycles
run fails with clear reason when review keeps failing through max_cycles
userStories.description: When review is enabled, let worker and reviewer iterate for configurable review cycles before final failure. Add review.max_cycles config (default 1). On REVIEW_FAIL verdict, run a remediation worker turn using reviewer feedback, rerun required checks, and re-run reviewer until pass or max cycles reached. Keep checks and review token behavior strict. Add tests for pass-after-feedback and fail-after-max-cycles behavior, and update docs/workflow examples.
userStories.title: Add multi-cycle worker-review loop

acceptanceCriteria: config parser supports publish and git policy defaults with validation
workflow docs include publish policy examples and safe defaults
tests cover valid and invalid publish policy values
userStories.description: Introduce publish policy configuration so successful runs can optionally push branches and create pull requests. Add config section with defaults: publish.provider (github/gitlab), publish.auto_push (never/on_pass), publish.auto_create_pr (never/draft/ready), and git.require_commit (true/false). Parse and validate config, document in WORKFLOW.md/README, and add tests for defaults and explicit values. Keep default behavior conservative (no push, no PR).

acceptanceCriteria: runtime profile config parses with defaults and validation
checks_only runs without starting processes
full_stack starts per-worktree processes and runs checks in that isolated runtime
runtime processes are stopped on run completion/failure
userStories.description: Implement runtime orchestration profiles so each issue worktree can run isolated processes when needed. Add workflow config for runtime profiles with strict isolation support: checks_only (no processes) and full_stack (per-worktree processes + per-worktree env vars/ports). Wire AgentRunner/Orchestrator lifecycle to start/stop per-worktree runtime via devenv before checks when profile requires it. Ensure checks can run inside devenv shell in the worktree. Include status visibility for runtime process state in orchestrator status output. Keep defaults lightweight so small stories run checks_only.

userStories.title: Add per-worktree devenv runtime isolation profiles

acceptanceCriteria: worker/reviewer/check/runtime outputs are persisted per run attempt
mix kollywood.orch.logs can print latest and specific attempt logs
follow mode streams appended log lines
userStories.description: Implement persistent run logs for worker, reviewer, checks, and runtime lifecycle per issue attempt. Store structured run metadata for UI use and write append-only log files under a project-scoped path. Add mix command mix kollywood.orch.logs STORY_ID [--follow] [--attempt N] to inspect logs. Include tests for log file creation, metadata capture, and follow mode output.

acceptanceCriteria: dashboard renders with project selector and persists selected project in URL
overview counters and active work reflect selected project only
navigation stays within selected project context
userStories.description: Add a LiveView dashboard shell with a top-right project selector and project-scoped navigation for Overview, Stories, Runs, and Settings. Projects must come from the SQLite store and route state must remain in selected project context. Show core counters (open/in_progress/done/failed), active workers, and last errors for selected project. Keep design clean and responsive for desktop/mobile.

acceptanceCriteria: stories board groups and filters by status within selected project
run detail shows timeline and logs for a selected story attempt
control actions invoke orchestrator/PRD commands correctly
userStories.description: Implement project-scoped Stories board and Run detail views. Stories board should group by status and show dependency badges, attempt count, and runtime profile. Run detail should include timeline/events, latest error, and live log panel from persisted logs. Add control actions: poll now, stop story, reset, rerun, rerun fresh worktree, mark failed/cancelled. Add tests for UI rendering and control event wiring.
